evals.description: Triggers on Solidity smart contract writing request
evals.prompt: Write a Solidity smart contract for an ERC-20 token with minting capabilities

evals.description: Triggers on smart contract security review request
evals.prompt: Review this smart contract for security vulnerabilities - it has a withdraw function that sends ETH
How can I optimize gas costs in my Solidity contract that uses a lot of storage?

evals.description: Can write a reentrancy-safe withdraw function
evals.prompt: Write a Solidity withdraw function for a vault contract that is safe against reentrancy attacks

evals.description: Can implement an ERC-4626 vault using OpenZeppelin
evals.prompt: Implement a tokenized yield vault using the ERC-4626 standard
My DeFi contract uses Uniswap V2 pool reserves to get the current token price for liquidation. Is this safe?

evals.description: Can write Foundry fuzz tests for a contract
evals.prompt: Write a Foundry test with fuzz testing for a token transfer function

evals.description: Warns against using tx.origin for authentication
evals.prompt: Can I use tx.origin to check if the caller is the contract owner?

evals.description: Knows about storage layout and proxy collision risks
evals.prompt: I'm upgrading my proxy contract implementation. What should I watch out for regarding storage?
How should I order the fields in my Solidity struct to save gas?

evals.description: Does not invent non-existent Solidity features
evals.prompt: How do I use Solidity's built-in ReentrancyGuard modifier without importing anything?
What does the ERC-9999 standard define for smart contracts?

evals.description: References the security audit guide for comprehensive audit
evals.prompt: Give me a complete smart contract audit checklist for a DeFi lending protocol

evals.description: Does not trigger for frontend dApp questions
evals.prompt: How do I connect a React frontend to MetaMask using ethers.js?
